UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's public profile information and aggregated statistics within the InnovateSphere application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

username.description: The user's chosen display name, which must be unique.

email.description: The user's email address, used for contact and potentially login identity.

profilePictureUrl.description: URL to the user's profile image.

bannerUrl.description: URL to the user's banner image.

bio.description: A short biographical description provided by the user.

interests.description: Categories the user is interested in.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user's profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user's profile was last updated.

stickers.description: Custom image stickers placed on the profile header.

customColors.description: Custom theme colors for profile sections.

totalIdeasPosted.description: The total number of ideas posted by this user.

totalViewsReceived.description: The sum of all views across all ideas posted by this user.

averageRatingReceived.description: The average rating received across all ideas posted by this user.

totalIdeasSaved.description: The total number of ideas this user has saved.

collaborationRequestsCount.description: The total number of collaboration requests received by this user.

Idea.title: Idea
Idea.description: Represents an innovative idea submitted by a user, including its details, media, and AI-generated analysis.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Idea entity.

authorId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who posted this idea.

title.description: The concise title of the idea.

description.description: A detailed description or overview of the idea.

problemStatement.description: A description of the problem that the idea aims to solve.

solutionDescription.description: A description of how the idea provides a solution to the stated problem.

targetAudience.description: The intended target users or market for this idea.

category.description: The category or domain to which the idea belongs.

mediaAssetUrls.description: An array of URLs pointing to images or videos associated with the idea.

innovationScore.description: AI-generated score indicating the level of innovation.

definition.description: Stores user's public profile information and aggregated analytics.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user.

definition.description: Stores details of innovative ideas submitted by users.

params.name: ideaId
params.description: The unique ID of the idea.

params.name: groupId
params.description: The unique ID of the group.
